hadith_entries.text:
931. Narrated Abu-Musa 3‘One night a house in
Madina was burnt with its occupants. On this occasion, the
Prophet said: "This fire is indeed your enemy, so whenever
you go to bed, put it out (to protect yourselves)." (Bukhari)

932. Narrated Jaber; The Prophet # said: “Close the door,
tie the mouth of the water container, convert or he said:
"Cover" the utensil, and pt off the lantern. For, Satan does not
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
open a closed thing, tie a tied mouth, nor does it uncover a
covered container, and the mouse may burn the house on its
owner." (At-Termizi).
